arts.ttl: GRAEME SOUNESS: Why Mo Salah's quiet performances against PSG prove Liverpool MUST convince him to sign a new contract... plus, the only way Ange Postecoglou may be able to keep his job at Tottenham
arts.sum: GRAEME SOUNESS: Mo Salah had two of his quietest games against Paris Saint-Germain but, regardless of that, the importance of getting him a new contract was still emphasised.

arts.ttl: Liverpool-linked Antonee Robinson breaks silence on transfer speculation with Champions League claim
arts.sum: Fulham left-back Antonee Robinson plays down talk of a potential move to Liverpool as just a "story in the paper" amid links with a switch to Anfield this summer.

arts.ttl: Will Fulham reach the Champions League? The race for Europe explained
arts.sum: The Premier League title race and relegation battles look ominously like 'done deals' - but what about the fight for the Champions League?

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on what Lucas Bergvall learned, Romero's post and Gray in midfield
arts.sum: Yeah I think so and again that has coincided with a couple of significant things and one is we are getting some significant players back and also, like I said, the ability to rotate the team and keep the team fresh. Another player who was heavily involved was Djed Spence and despite man of the match performances in the Premier League in the past month, the 24-year-old has not been handed a spot in Thomas Tuchel's first England squad.

arts.ttl: 'He fights on' - National media give Ange Postecoglou sack verdict after crucial Europa League win - football.london
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has potentially saved his job at Tottenham following his side's 3-1 victory (3-2 on aggregate) against AZ Alkmaar to reach the Europa League quarter-finals on Thursday. "But Odobert kept Postecoglou’s hopes of ending the season with some silverware alive – and perhaps even saved his job – when the Frenchman swept home at the end of a flowing move instigated by Maddison to send Spurs into the quarter-finals of the Europa League for the first time since 2013."

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reacts to Djed Spence and James Maddison Thomas Tuchel England squad omission
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou believes Djed Spence and James Maddison "will be in the frame" for Thomas Tuchel's England squad if they keep performing and working hard. The Tottenham duo were not included in the German's first squad as Three Lions boss for this month's international fixtures but teammate Dominic Solanke was selected.

arts.ttl: Fulham lineup vs. Tottenham: Predicted XI for Premier League London derby as Adama Traore boost revealed
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Fulham could line up for Sunday's Premier League London derby against Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: Tottenham lineup vs. Fulham: Predicted XI for Premier League London derby as Wilson Odobert starts
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Tottenham Hotspur could line up for Sunday's Premier League London derby against Fulham.

arts.ttl: Preview: Fulham vs. Tottenham Hotspur - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Premier League clash between Fulham and Tottenham Hotspur, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Positive update from Ange Postecoglou ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash with Fulham
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has reported the squad is looking 'pretty good' ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash with Fulham. Having seen the team disrupted by injuries over the last few months, it was a most welcome update from Ange following our progress in the Europa League being secured with a 3-2 win over AZ Alkmaar on aggregate.
